RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant/Cross-Complainant ANOUSHIRAVAN MASSOUMI'S Motion To Strike Costs Bill - The motion to strike the costs memorandum is granted. Judge McBride clearly ruled that "[n]either side shall be deemed a prevailing party." (Statement of Decision, 7:19). Plaintiff Murray fails to demonstrate that CCP 998 is a basis to recover his costs. Nothing in the statement of decision clearly states the value of the property at the time of judgment and the amount of equity is uncertain. It is unclear whether the judgment or acceptance of plaintiff Murray's CCP 998 offer would lead to a better result for defendant Massoumi.Order signed in open court.
